plugins.name: tecman-docx
plugins.description: Generate or restyle Microsoft Word (.docx) documents in the Tecman house style and brand.

plugins.name: ai-project-kickoff
plugins.description: Kick off a new AI project: requirements gathering, then PoC documentation generation to the Tecman standard, adhering to industry standards. Includes /new-ai-project, the ai-poc-docs skill, and a design-reviewer agent.
